title: Enhanced My Work Section
excerpt:

posts.author: bmauch (Ben Mauch)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our organization has over 100 projects going at any given time that teams of resources are assigned to in order to help balance everyone’s work load.
The My Work section is limited to 50 boards and 1,000 tasks to show up. This is causing a massive issue for our teams to potentially miss due tasks.
We urgently need a greater expansion of the My Work section. We are on pace to have 200 projects running and will need to figure out a solution soon if it is not able to be in monday.com.
